title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 229.090 - Sales agents — certain persons barred
text:
229.090.  Sales agents — certain persons barred. — No member of a highway board or county commission, and no highway engineer or road overseer shall be the sales agent in the sale to, or purchase by, the state, county or road districts, of road tools, culvert or bridge materials or machinery, or be pecuniarily interested in any contract for the building of any bridge or culvert or for the improvement of any public road to which the county or any road district is a party.
(RSMo 1939 § 8593) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7944; 1919 § 10731; 1909 § 10542 
County engineers, surveyors and overseer not to be sales agents, 61.300
